name: meter panel
description:
This dataset is specifically designed for segmenting the region of interest (ROI) within the dial reading area, and this region is characterized by containing the dial wheel (mechanical roller counter) device.
此数据集专为对表盘读数区域内的ROI进行分割而设计，ROI的特征是包含有字轮（机械滚轮计数器）装置。
Warning: This dataset (with 500 samples) contains approximately 5% negative samples.
警告：此数据集（包含 500 个样本）中约有 5%为负样本。
